name: 希特勒统治下的德国
subject: history
domain_name: 权威与威权 / Authoritarian States / Authoritarian States
curriculum_points: Students will be able to evaluate the methods used by the Nazi regime to establish and maintain total control, including the use of terror, propaganda, and economic policies (HL/SL).
Students will be able to analyse the ideological roots and implementation of Nazi racial and social policies, including the persecution of minorities and the Holocaust.
